png

Class PngChunkITXT

  • java.lang.Object
    • png.PngChunk
      • png.PngChunkITXT
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TextualChunk

    public class PngChunkITXT
extends PngChunk
implements TextualChunk
    Extended to support an iTXt chunk in a PNG file, which stores international text data.

    This chunk supports both compressed and uncompressed UTF-8 encoded text, along with optional language and translated keyword metadata.

    The iTXt chunk layout consists of the following fields
    Field Description
    Keyword (Latin-1) 1–79 bytes + null terminator
    Compression flag 1 byte (0 = uncompressed, 1 = compressed)
    Compression method 1 byte (must be 0 for zlib/deflate)
    Language tag (Latin-1) null-terminated string
    Translated keyword (UTF-8) null-terminated string
    Text (UTF-8) compressed or plain text depending on the compression flag
    Since:
    13 August 2025
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

    • Constructor Detail

      • PngChunkITXT

        public PngChunkITXT(long length,
                    byte[] typeBytes,
                    int crc32,
                    byte[] data,
                    long offsetStart)
        Constructs a new PngChunkITXT with the specified parameters.
        Parameters:
        length - the length of the chunk's data field (excluding type and CRC)
        typeBytes - the raw 4-byte chunk type
        crc32 - the CRC value read from the file
        data - raw chunk data
        offsetStart - the absolute physical position in the file where the chunk begins

    • Method Detail

      • hasKeyword

        public boolean hasKeyword(TextKeyword keyword)
        Checks whether this chunk contains a specific textual keyword.
        Specified by:
        hasKeyword in interface TextualChunk
        Parameters:
        keyword - the TextKeyword to search for
        Returns:
        true if found, false otherwise
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the specified keyword is null

      • toTextEntry

        public java.util.Optional<TextEntry> toTextEntry()
        Extracts a keyword-text pair from the iTXt chunk.
        Specified by:
        toTextEntry in interface TextualChunk
        Returns:
        an Optional containing the extracted keyword and text as a TextEntry instance if the keyword is present, otherwise, Optional.empty()

      • getKeyword

        public java.lang.String getKeyword()
        Gets the keyword extracted from the iTXt chunk.
        Specified by:
        getKeyword in interface TextualChunk
        Returns:
        the keyword

      • getText

        public java.lang.String getText()
        Gets the text extracted from the iTXt chunk.
        Specified by:
        getText in interface TextualChunk
        Returns:
        the UTF-8 text, otherwise an empty string if it was not decoded

      • getLanguageTag

        public java.lang.String getLanguageTag()
        Gets the language tag extracted from the iTXt chunk.
        Returns:
        the language tag

      • getTranslatedKeyword

        public java.lang.String getTranslatedKeyword()
        Gets the translated keyword extracted from the iTXt chunk.
        Returns:
        the translated keyword

      • isCompressed

        public boolean isCompressed()
        Validates that the compression flag is enabled for this chunk.
        Returns:
        true if the compression flag is set to one

      • getTextOffset

        public long getTextOffset()
        Returns the relative byte offset within the chunk's data segment where the actual text or XML content begins.

        This offset accounts for the variable-length iTXt header fields (Keyword, Language Tag, etc) and points to the first byte of the textual payload itself only.

        Returns:
        the number of bytes from the start of the data segment to the beginning of the text/XML

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and contents.
        Overrides:
        toString in class PngChunk
        Returns:
        a formatted string describing this chunk
